name: daraja-kit
description: Agent-forward M-Pesa Daraja integration toolkit — SDK, MCP server, knowledge base, templates

scripts.build: npm run build -w @daraja-kit/sdk && npm run build -w @daraja-kit/mcp && npm run build -w @daraja-kit/agent-toolkit
scripts.test:sandbox: cd packages/sdk && npm run test -- --testPathPattern sandbox
